full_description: TravelPal is a travel planning app that helps users discover new destinations, create itineraries, and manage travel documents. It provides recommendations and tips for a smooth travel experience. With TravelPal, you can explore different cultures, try new foods, and make unforgettable memories. The app allows you to organize your trips, set reminders, and share your itinerary with friends and family. Get real-time updates on flight schedules, hotel bookings, and weather forecasts. Whether you're a seasoned traveler or embarking on your first adventure, TravelPal is your ultimate travel companion.
